activities.title: IM 70.3 NC Bike
activities.description: Super disappointed in this. Felt like I couldn't express my power or fitness at any point today due to my discomfort in riding in the aero bars around trucks and on narrow roads with wind. What is comparably my strength (FTP) has turned into me being 20 minutes behind everyone else because I can't handle my bike.

2km @ HM pace (in reality 3:45s)
4x400 @ 5K pace (in reality 3:30s)
Didn't make but should've been 5x200 @ fast

activities.title: Ironman California Bike
activities.description:
Super proud of this ride in terms of power, but the speed return raises some serious questions. Bike fell and power meter shifted up the power somehow. Ride until the fall (and assuming afterwards too) NP 240W, AP 233 for   Crazy. Also absolutely terrible winds and rough roads made this course no fun at all.
